name: Pico Cervero – circular from Navarredonda de la Rinconada - Espacio Natural de las Quilamas
name_original: Pico Cervero – circular desde Navarredonda de la Rinconada - Espacio Natural de las Quilamas
region_intro: Hiking around Navarredonda De La Rinconada offers diverse terrain, characterized by natural spaces, forests, and prominent peaks. The region features a network of trails that traverse varied landscapes, including wooded areas and open vistas. Hikers can explore paths leading through natural parks and ascend to local summits. Best hiking trails around Navarredonda De La Rinconada The most popular hiking route is Asentadero-Bosque de los Espejos Trail, a 6.9 miles (11.1 km) trail that takes 3 hours 27 minutes to complete. This moderate route leads through a notable forest area. Another top favourite among local hikers is Sendero de las Honfrías - circular from Linares de Riofrío - Espacio Natural de las Quilamas, a moderate 4.5 miles (7.2 km) path. This circular trail explores the natural landscapes of Espacio Natural de las Quilamas. Local hikers also love the Pico Cervero – circular from Navarredonda de la Rinconada - Espacio Natural de las Quilamas, a 9.1 miles (14.7 km) trail leading through Espacio Natural de las Quilamas to Pico Cervero, often completed in about 4 hours 17 minutes. Hiking around Navarredonda De La Rinconada is defined by natural spaces, forests, and peaks, offering varied terrain for exploration. The network offers options for different ability levels, from easy paths to more challenging ascents. The routes in Navarredonda De La Rinconada are highly rated by the komoot community with an average score of 4.6 stars from over 40 reviews. More than 200 hikers have used komoot to explore Navarredonda De La Rinconada's varied terrain.
region_faq:
Q: How many hiking trails are available in Navarredonda De La Rinconada?
A: There are 14 hiking trails around Navarredonda De La Rinconada, offering diverse terrain from natural spaces and forests to prominent peaks. These routes cater to various ability levels.

Q: Are there any easy hiking routes for beginners or families?
A: Yes, Navarredonda De La Rinconada offers 3 easy hiking routes. These paths are suitable for beginners or families looking for a less strenuous outdoor experience. While specific easy routes aren't detailed here, you can find them on komoot.

Q: What kind of terrain can I expect on the hiking trails?
A: The hiking trails around Navarredonda De La Rinconada feature diverse terrain, including natural spaces, wooded areas, and open vistas. You'll traverse through forests and ascend to local summits, with options ranging from gentle paths to more challenging ascents.

Q: Are there any circular hiking routes in the area?
A: Yes, there are several circular routes. For example, the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e993200313/sendero-de-las-honfrias-circular-from-linares-de-riofrio-espacio-natural-de-las-quilamas" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Sendero de las Honfrías - circular from Linares de Riofrío - Espacio Natural de las Quilamas&lt;/a&gt; is a moderate 4.5-mile (7.2 km) path exploring the natural landscapes of Espacio Natural de las Quilamas. Another option is the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e993202419/pico-cervero-circular-from-navarredonda-de-la-rinconada-espacio-natural-de-las-quilamas" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Pico Cervero – circular from Navarredonda de la Rinconada - Espacio Natural de las Quilamas&lt;/a&gt;, a 9.1-mile (14.7 km) trail leading to Pico Cervero.

Q: What are some notable natural attractions or landmarks I can see while hiking?
A: While hiking, you can explore significant natural features like &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/1188645" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Cervero Peak&lt;/a&gt;, a prominent summit in the region. You might also encounter the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/1188570" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Ascent to Puerto de Valero&lt;/a&gt;, a mountain pass offering scenic views. The trails often lead through the Espacio Natural de las Quilamas, a protected natural area.

Q: What do other hikers say about the trails in Navarredonda De La Rinconada?
A: The routes in Navarredonda De La Rinconada are highly rated by the komoot community, with an average score of 4.6 stars from over 40 reviews. Hikers often praise the varied terrain, which includes natural spaces, forests, and peaks, making for engaging exploration.

Q: Are there any trails that lead through unique forest areas?
A: Yes, the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e992996831/asentadero-bosque-de-los-espejos-trail" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Asentadero-Bosque de los Espejos Trail&lt;/a&gt; is a notable route that leads through a distinctive forest area. This moderate 6.9-mile (11.1 km) trail offers a chance to experience the region's wooded landscapes.

Q: Are there any longer, more challenging hikes for experienced trekkers?
A: For experienced trekkers, the region offers more challenging options. The &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/38151380" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Cervero Peak – Pico Cervero (1465 m) loop from Linares de Riofrío&lt;/a&gt; is a difficult 11.7-mile (18.9 km) route with significant elevation gain, perfect for those seeking a demanding adventure.

Q: What is the typical duration for hikes in this area?
A: Hiking durations vary depending on the route's length and difficulty. For instance, the moderate &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e992996831/asentadero-bosque-de-los-espejos-trail" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Asentadero-Bosque de los Espejos Trail&lt;/a&gt; typically takes around 3 hours 27 minutes, while the longer &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e993202419/pico-cervero-circular-from-navarredonda-de-la-rinconada-espacio-natural-de-las-quilamas" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Pico Cervero – circular from Navarredonda de la Rinconada&lt;/a&gt; can take about 4 hours 17 minutes.

Q: Are there any historical or cultural points of interest near the hiking trails?
A: Beyond natural beauty, the region also features cultural points of interest. You can find charming settlements like &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/5334119" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Sequeros&lt;/a&gt; and &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/5334161" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Villanueva del Conde&lt;/a&gt;. Additionally, the historic &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/3984614" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;San Martín del Castañar Castle&lt;/a&gt; is another landmark worth exploring in the vicinity.

Q: What is the best time of year to go hiking in Navarredonda De La Rinconada?
A: Given the region's diverse terrain of forests and peaks, spring and autumn generally offer the most pleasant hiking conditions with mild temperatures and vibrant scenery. Summer can be warm, while winter might present colder conditions, especially at higher elevations.
tips:
Located between the municipalities of Navarredonda de la Rinconada and Escurial de la Sierra, in the Sierra de Francia-Quilamas region.
A protected natural area within the Natura 2000 network, with oak and chestnut forests and wildlife such as the golden eagle and griffon vulture.
